JavaScript Core Concepts (58): Where Property Descriptors Actually Show Up in Real Frameworks
We've spent the whole chapter digging into object property descriptors. Now let's see where this stuff actually shows up in real frameworks.
Property descriptors and the frameworks you use
I want to show you just how important the property descriptor concept is in mainstream frameworks. The easiest way to prove it is to crack open Vue.js and look.
